summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Al-Cazar Fort hotel website. All WhatsApp integration, address updates, room filters, social links, and Google Maps embed verified successfully.
passed_tests: Topbar displays ONLY 'Jheel Road, Naran City, Naran, Pakistan' (no Multan address)
Hero 'Book Your Stay' button redirects to WhatsApp with phone=923492244011
Navbar 'Book Now' button redirects to WhatsApp with phone=923492244011
Home page booking widget 'Check Availability' button opens WhatsApp with booking details
Rooms page displays category filter buttons: All, Rooms, Signature Suites, Suites
Rooms page shows all 11 rooms when 'All' filter is active
Filter buttons work correctly (e.g., 'Signature Suites' shows 2 rooms)
Each room card 'Book' button is WhatsApp link with phone=923492244011
Room detail page 'Book this Room' button is WhatsApp link with phone=923492244011
Pool section 'Reserve Your Stay' button is WhatsApp link with phone=923492244011
Why Choose Us 'Make a Reservation' button is WhatsApp link with phone=923492244011
Activities page 'Plan Your Adventure' button is WhatsApp link with phone=923492244011
Restaurant page 'Reserve a Table' button is WhatsApp link with phone=923492244011
Booking page form submission opens WhatsApp with all booking details pre-filled
Contact page shows ONLY Jheel Road address (no Multan address)
Contact page Google Maps iframe loads with src containing 'Al-Cazar Fort'
Contact page has 'WhatsApp Us' link in Call Us card
Contact form 'Send via WhatsApp' button opens WhatsApp with form data
Footer social links include Facebook (Alcazarfort), Instagram (al_cazar_fort), TripAdvisor
Footer address shows only Jheel Road address (no Multan)
WhatsApp floating button (bottom right) opens WhatsApp with phone=923492244011
No console errors on any page

success_percentage.backend: N/A (backend not tested as per instructions)
